hook.say: James Van Der Beek's final role gets a poignant tribute.
hook.show: James Van Der Beek's final role gets a poignant tribute.

lines.say: Prime Video's new Elle series honors the late actor.
lines.show: Prime Video's new *Elle* series honors the late actor.

lines.say: Van Der Beek passed in February twenty twenty-six, appearing as Dean Wilson.
lines.show: Van Der Beek passed in February 2026, appearing as Dean Wilson.

lines.say: A title card “In loving memory of James Van Der Beek” closes his first episode.
lines.show: A title card “In loving memory of James Van Der Beek” closes his first episode.

lines.say: He plays a mayoral candidate, later arrested for extortion, per The Hollywood Reporter.
lines.show: He plays a mayoral candidate, later arrested for extortion, per The Hollywood Reporter.

lines.say: Costar June Diane Raphael praised his family devotion and performance to E! News.
lines.show: Costar June Diane Raphael praised his family devotion and performance to E! News.

lines.say: This dedication marks a public capstone to his decades-long career.
lines.show: This dedication marks a public capstone to his decades-long career.

lines.say: Full story at The Screen Report — link in bio.
lines.show: Full story at The Screen Report — link in bio.

captions.instagram:
Prime Video's new series *Elle* pays a moving tribute to the late James Van Der Beek, featuring his final on-screen performance. Learn more about the dedication and his impactful role.

pinterest.title: James Van Der Beek Receives Heartfelt Tribute in Elle Series
pinterest.description: Prime Video's new series *Elle* honors the late James Van Der Beek with a special title card following his final powerful performance as Dean Wilson. Discover the details of this poignant dedication.

youtube.title: Elle Series Honors James Van Der Beek's Final Role #Shorts
youtube.description: Prime Video's *Elle* dedicates an episode to James Van Der Beek, celebrating his last on-screen performance.

captions.x: The new Prime Video series *Elle* features a moving tribute to James Van Der Beek's final role. A touching dedication for a beloved actor. #JamesVanDerBeek #ElleSeries

spoken: James Van Der Beek's final role gets a poignant tribute. Prime Video's new Elle series honors the late actor. Van Der Beek passed in February twenty twenty-six, appearing as Dean Wilson. A title card “In loving memory of James Van Der Beek” closes his first episode. He plays a mayoral candidate, later arrested for extortion, per The Hollywood Reporter. Costar June Diane Raphael praised his family devotion and performance to E! News. This dedication marks a public capstone to his decades-long career. Full story at The Screen Report — link in bio.
